content: The 2008 Summer Olympics were hosted by Beijing, China.
raw_content: The 2008 Summer Olympics were hosted by Beijing, China.
reasoning: Okay, so I need to figure out which city hosted the Summer Olympics in 2008. I remember that the Olympics are held every four years, and they switch between Summer and Winter Games. Let me think about the years around 2008. I know that in 2004, the Summer Olympics were in Athens, Greece. Then in 2008, I think it was a city in Asia. Maybe Beijing? I've heard that China hosted the Olympics around that time. I'm pretty sure it was Beijing in 2008 because I remember the opening ceremony being really impressive with a lot of fireworks and performances. Also, I think that was the year Usain Bolt started making headlines. So yeah, I'm pretty confident it was Beijing.
